package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
    var dbCursor_491 int = 491
    var factor float64 = 2.5
    res := dbCursor_491 * factor
    fmt.Println(res)
}
stack_trace: ./database_491.go:33:12: invalid operation: dbCursor_491 * factor (mismatched types int and float64)
fix_brief: Cast integer tracker 'dbCursor_491' explicitly into float64 types to support decimal operations.
fix_solution:
package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
    var dbCursor_491 int = 491
    var factor float64 = 2.5
    res := float64(dbCursor_491) * factor
    fmt.Println(res)
}
